options.text: I didn't refill it, but I'll pay for the missing fuel.
I don't know how cars work, so I didn't check.
The tank was full when I got it, so I didn't need to.
Can you refill it for me? I'm in a hurry.

content.explanation: 正确答案表明承认未加油并主动提出补偿，符合责任担当的口语回应。选项2缺乏责任感，选项3虽合理但未回应是否加油，选项4推卸责任，不符合沟通原则。
content.speakerText: The tank's about half full—did you refill it?
content.speakerTextCn: 油箱大概一半满，你加过油吗？

options.text: I didn't notice it when I picked it up—I checked the inspection report.
I don't care about scratches—they're just cosmetic.
Whoever drove it before must have done it.
I'll fix it myself with some toothpaste.

content.explanation: 正确答案明确区分损伤为取车前已有，并引用检查报告作为证据，是专业且安全的回应。选项2态度轻率，选项3推卸责任无依据，选项4提出荒谬解决方案，不符合实际场景。
content.speakerText: There's a small scratch on the driver's side door—did you notice that?
content.speakerTextCn: 驾驶座门上有道小划痕，你注意到了吗？
